title: deeper then darkness
description: have you always wanted a deep dark update well this mod is all about the deep dark!
body:
hello and welcome to the deeper then darkness mod here is all the infomation 
you will need for the mod!


To access the Deep Dark Dimension, you’ll need reinforced deepslate and a warden's key. You can use the large portal found in ancient cities or create your own. Reinforced deepslate is crafted using 1 deepslate in the center, sculk blocks around the edges, and sculk veins filling the remaining slots. This recipe gives you 3 blocks of reinforced deepslate. However, be careful where you place them because they are unmineable. Once your portal is set up, light it with a warden’s key to activate it.

The Deep Dark introduces a new mob called the sculk worm. This small, worm-like creature has a sculky appearance and becomes aggressive when attacked. It spawns naturally in the Deep Dark, and if you’re in Creative mode, you can access its spawn egg.

New structures can be found in the Overworld and the Deep Dark. The sculk house and deep dark ruined portal generate in grassy biomes like plains and forests, while the sculk castle is exclusive to the Deep Dark. The sculk house features a unique villager called the Sculker, who can also be spawned using a sculking table. This villager offers trades for items such as reinforced deepslate, warden keys, and sculk miners.

The mod also introduces the sculk miner, a powerful tool that acts like "Efficiency 100" for breaking sculk blocks. It is crafted similarly to a sign, but with sculk blocks instead of wood and a sculk vein placed on the left side. Additionally, infected water, a special liquid found in the Deep Dark, can be smelted into sculk, making it a valuable resource for farming XP.

For those using the Create mod, you can automate sculk production and XP farming. Mechanical crafters can be set up to make buckets, and dispensers can collect infected water, which creates an infinite source. The water can then be smelted into sculk using furnaces, allowing for a continuous supply of XP.

Enjoy exploring the mysteries of the Deep Dark and experimenting with the features this mod offers!
